entity.summary: Aptos-native decentralized exchange combining an automated market maker, central-limit order book, and smart router. The protocol remains reachable with low but non-zero tracked liquidity.
entity.notes: AUX appeared in the first Aptos mainnet DeFi cohort on October 19, 2022. HEI uses limited rather than active because the official interface remains available while independently tracked TVL is small.

events.title: AUX Exchange launched with Aptos mainnet
events.description: AUX entered public operation as an Aptos decentralized exchange offering AMM, order-book, and routed trading venues.
events.notes: The Pyth Network mainnet announcement identifies AUX in the Aptos launch cohort and describes its three trading venues; the first-party site confirms the same product identity.

evidence.title: Pyth Launches Price Oracles on Aptos
evidence.notes: Official ecosystem-provider announcement identifies AUX as a live Aptos launch-cohort DEX with AMM, CLOB, and router venues.

evidence.title: AUX Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party site identifies AUX as an Aptos exchange with zero-fee order-book trading, advanced order types, routing, and open-source contracts.

evidence.title: AUX Exchange mainnet application
evidence.notes: The official Aptos swap application remains reachable and exposes wallet-connected trading.

evidence.title: AUX Exchange protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics show low but non-zero Aptos TVL, supporting limited rather than dead status.
